task: Using only the embedded packet, audit and repair an adaptive-learning mastery graph to resolve inconsistent prerequisite recommendations. Produce a mastery_graph_audit.csv and a product_note.md that (a) repair graph edges and mark repaired_edge per record, (b) rank records by technical and economic impact, (c) run the specified sensitivity shift check and flag records that become unstable, (d) mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review, and (e) recommend hold / release / retest / mitigation. Include formulas/executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
